response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced polyglot Staff Engineer with direct, recent experience in AI-agent infrastructure (MCP) and building high-throughput distributed systems (handling millions of requests per second). While he lacks explicit Python experience—a stated must-have—his deep architectural knowledge, strong TypeScript background, and complete alignment with agentic workflows make him an exceptionally strong candidate worth interviewing.
strengths: Direct experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, perfectly aligning with the company's agentic engineering culture.
Proven capability in designing high-throughput distributed systems, evidenced by his work handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby.
Strong Staff-level technical leadership and ownership, demonstrated through founding GISCollective, running Refactoring Dojos, and driving Agile practices like TDD.
concerns: Lacks explicit professional experience or skills listed in Python, which is a must-have technical requirement for the role.
Much of his deep systems programming and low-latency experience is in DLang, which is less common than mainstream enterprise backend languages.
Has a history of relatively short tenures (1-2 years) in several of his past roles, which may prompt questions regarding long-term strategic ownership.
